response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum years of experience with a strong and diverse technical background. His entrepreneurial initiative in founding GISCollective and his recent work on AI-agent infrastructure are promising. However, his resume primarily reflects a Senior/Staff Engineer level of contribution, lacking the demonstrated Director-level strategic leadership, experience advising major customers, and the deep, recognized expertise in building large-scale AI platforms that this Principal-level role requires.
strengths: Exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with a broad skill set across web, mobile, and embedded systems.
Demonstrates strong entrepreneurial spirit and project ownership by founding and developing the GISCollective platform.
Has recent, hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and tooling.
concerns: Lacks experience at the required Director/Principal level; resume indicates a Senior/Staff Engineer trajectory.
No clear evidence of defining high-level product strategy or advising strategic external customers on technology adoption.
AI-specific experience appears to be very recent and may not meet the bar for 'recognized expertise' with a track record of shipping major AI products.
